'''Karnst''' was in the [[Karstaxon Regions]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was the location of a [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]] refueling depot.

{{Planet-stub}}
